from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Request, Response
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from uuid import uuid4

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

tasks = []
last_id = 0

@app.post("/tasks", status_code=201, response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    global last_id
    last_id += 1
    task.id = last_id
    task.created_at = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task.dict())
    return task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=List[Task])
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = tasks
    if status:
        filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if task['status'] == status]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    start = (page - 1) * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[start:end]
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    task = next((task for task in tasks if task['id'] == task_id), None)
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    task['status'] = status['status']
    return task

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Depends, status
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import uuid4

app = FastAPI()

origins = [
    "http://localhost:3000",
    "http://localhost:8000",
]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

tasks = []
next_id = 1

def get_task(task_id: int):
    for task in tasks:
        if task.id == task_id:
            return task
    return None

@app.post("/tasks", status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED, response_model=Task)
def create_task(task: Task):
    global next_id
    task.id = next_id
    task.created_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task.dict())
    next_id += 1
    return task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=dict)
def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if status is None or task['status'] == status]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    start = (page - 1) * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[start:end]
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    task = get_task(task_id)
    if task is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Task not found")
    task['status'] = status['status']
    return task

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Request
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: str | None = None
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

    class Config:
        orm_mode = True

tasks = []

@app.post("/tasks", status_code=201, response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    task.id = len(tasks) + 1
    task.created_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task)
    return task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=dict)
async def get_tasks(status: str | None = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if task.status == status or status is None]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    offset = (page - 1) * page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[offset:offset + page_size]
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    for task in tasks:
        if task.id == task_id:
            task.status = status['status']
            return task
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Response, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
import uuid

app = FastAPI()

origins = [
    "*",
]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

class TaskUpdate(BaseModel):
    status: str

class TaskCreate(BaseModel):
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]

class PaginatedTasks(BaseModel):
    items: List[Task]
    total: int
    page: int
    page_size: int

tasks = []

@app.post("/tasks", response_model=Task, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_task(task: TaskCreate):
    new_task = Task(
        id=len(tasks) + 1,
        title=task.title,
        description=task.description,
        status='pending',
        created_at=datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    )
    tasks.append(new_task)
    return new_task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=PaginatedTasks)
async def get_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if status is None or task.status == status]
    paginated_tasks = filtered_tasks[(page-1)*page_size:page*page_size]
    return {
        "items": paginated_tasks,
        "total": len(filtered_tasks),
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size
    }

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task(task_id: int, task: TaskUpdate):
    task_to_update = next((task for task in tasks if task.id == task_id), None)
    if task_to_update is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Task not found")
    task_to_update.status = task.status
    return task_to_update

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Request
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

tasks = []

@app.post("/tasks", response_model=Task, status_code=201)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    task.id = len(tasks) + 1
    task.created_at = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task.dict())
    return task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=dict)
async def get_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = tasks
    if status:
        filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if task['status'] == status]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    start = (page - 1) * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[start:end]
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    for task in tasks:
        if task['id'] == task_id:
            task['status'] = status['status']
            return Task(**task)
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

from fastapi import FastAPI, Response, Request, HTTPException
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

tasks = []
task_id = 1

@app.post("/tasks", status_code=201, response_model=Task)
def create_task(task: Task):
    global task_id
    task.id = task_id
    task.created_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task.dict())
    task_id += 1
    return task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=dict)
def get_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if status is None or task['status'] == status]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    start = (page - 1) * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[start:end]
    return {"items": [Task(**task) for task in items], "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    for task in tasks:
        if task['id'] == task_id:
            task['status'] = status['status']
            return Task(**task)
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Request
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = None
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

    class Config:
        schema_extra = {
            "example": {
                "id": 1,
                "title": "Buy milk",
                "description": "Buy milk from the store",
                "status": "pending",
                "created_at": "2023-03-21T10:30:00"
            }
        }

tasks = []
task_id = 1

@app.post("/tasks", status_code=201, response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    global task_id
    task.id = task_id
    task.created_at = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task.dict())
    task_id += 1
    return task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model=dict)
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if task.get('status') == status] if status else tasks
    start = (page - 1) * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    return {
        "items": filtered_tasks[start:end],
        "total": len(filtered_tasks),
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size
    }

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    for task in tasks:
        if task.get('id') == task_id:
            task['status'] = status.get('status')
            return Task(**task)
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Request
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str]
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str

tasks: List[Task] = []
next_id: int = 1

@app.post("/tasks", status_code=201)
def create_task(task: Task):
    global next_id
    task.id = next_id
    task.created_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task)
    next_id += 1
    return task

@app.get("/tasks")
def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = tasks if status is None else [task for task in tasks if task.status == status]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    items = filtered_tasks[(page - 1) * page_size:page * page_size]
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status")
def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: dict):
    task = next((task for task in tasks if task.id == task_id), None)
    if task is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    task.status = status["status"]
    return task
